description_long: This is a blue stuffed toy shaped like a bear, featuring a textured, fabric-like surface. Its face is simple, with two round white eyes and a small pink nose, and it has two rounded ears on top of its head. The front of the toy displays a vertical line of red stitches, possibly representing a seam or a decorative element. The back of the toy has a curved line of red stitches across the upper part, suggesting a repaired or stylized seam. The arms and legs are short and rounded, giving the toy a soft, huggable appearance. The overall design is minimalistic, with no visible clothing or accessories.
description: A blue, fabric-textured stuffed bear with white eyes, a pink nose, and red stitched details on the front and back. The toy has a simple, rounded form and a soft, plush appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bear's face, white eyes, pink nose, and a vertical line of red stitches on the chest.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the bear's profile, rounded limbs, and the protruding nose and eyes.
description_view_2: Back view displaying a curved line of red stitches across the upper back and the rounded shape of the head and body.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the profile, rounded limbs, and the side of the face.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral, with round white eyes and a small pink nose, and no visible mouth or eyebrows. The lack of a mouth gives the toy a simple, expressionless look.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting upright with arms slightly outstretched and legs bent forward. The head is upright and facing forward.
